2604.11229.title: RECIPER: A Dual-View Retrieval Pipeline for Procedure-Oriented Materials Question Answering
2604.11229.paper_summary: Retrieving procedure-oriented evidence from materials science papers is difficult because key synthesis details are often scattered across long, context-heavy documents and are not well captured by paragraph-only dense retrieval. We present RECIPER, a dual-view retrieval pipeline that indexes both paragraph-level context and compact large language model-extracted procedural summaries, then combines the two candidate streams with lightweight lexical reranking. Across four dense retrieval backbones, RECIPER consistently improves early-rank retrieval over paragraph-only dense retrieval, achieving average gains of +3.73 in Recall@1, +2.85 in nDCG@10, and +3.13 in MRR. With BGE-large-en-v1.5, it reaches 86.82%, 97.07%, and 97.85% on Recall@1, Recall@5, and Recall@10, respectively. We further observe improved downstream question answering under automatic metrics, suggesting that procedural summaries can serve as a useful complementary retrieval signal for procedure-oriented materials question answering. Code and data are available at https://github.com/ReaganWu/RECIPER.
2604.11229.paper_summary_zh: 從材料科學論文中檢索程序導向的證據是困難的，因為關鍵的合成細節通常散佈在冗長且充滿上下文的文件中，且僅依賴段落進行密集檢索無法很好地捕捉這些細節。<lb/>我們提出了RECIPER，一個雙視角檢索管道，該管道同時索引段落級上下文和緊湊的大型語言模型提取的程序摘要，然後通過輕量級的詞彙重新排序將這兩個候選流結合起來。<lb/>在四個密集檢索骨幹上，RECIPER始終改善了早期排名檢索，相較於僅依賴段落的密集檢索，平均提升了+3.73的Recall@1、+2.85的nDCG@10和+3.13的MRR。<lb/>使用BGE-large-en-v1.5時，Recall@1、Recall@5和Recall@10的分別達到86.82%、97.07%和97.85%。<lb/>我們進一步觀察到在自動評估指標下，後續的問題回答有所改善，這表明程序摘要可以作為程序導向材料問題回答的一個有用的補充檢索信號。<lb/>代碼和數據可在https://github.com/ReaganWu/RECIPER獲得。
2604.11229.author: Zhuoyu Wu et.al.
2604.11229.authors: Zhuoyu Wu, Wenhui Ou, Pei-Sze Tan, Wenqi Fang, Sailaja Rajanala, Raphaël C. -W. Phan
